torch_pattern:
noise_pred = noise_pred * sigma_difference
latents = latents + noise_pred
applicability_notes: Observed contiguous chain at all call sites: ttnn.multiply_(a, b) immediately followed by ttnn.add_(latents, a) — i.e. latents += noise_pred * sigma_difference (Euler/scheduler update). Candidate for a single fused addcmul-style kernel; would also remove the trace-time allocation noted in the call site.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: latents tensor, per-submesh shard of diffusion latent (batch x latent_channels x H/8 x W/8 equivalent)
placement_observations.source: call_site: ttnn.add_(latents[submesh_id], ...) in scheduler step loop; default interleaved memory, persistent across denoising iterations (copy_host_to_device_tensor into preallocated _sigma_difference_list / _intermediate_noise_list buffers)
